title: Kerberoasting & Lateral Movement via WMI - Engineering Dept
description: Kerberoasting attack followed by WMI-based lateral movement across engineering network. Attacker compromised a domain user, requested TGS tickets for service accounts, cracked offline, then moved laterally via WMI to deploy credential access tools. T1558.003 T1047 T1552.001 T1021.003

evidence.content: TGS request from 172.16.30.5 (WS-ENG-05) for service accounts: MSSQLSvc/sql-eng-prod.engineering.local, HTTP/fs-eng-01.engineering.local, CIFS/fs-eng-01.engineering.local. 450 requests in 5 minutes from user jdoe. T1558.003
Credential validation failures from 172.16.30.5 for service accounts svc_sql, svc_backup_eng. 1,200 FAILED attempts followed by 3 SUCCESS events. T1110.003 T1558.003
Interactive logon from 172.16.30.5 to 172.16.30.120 (SQL-ENG-PROD) with user svc_sql. Logon type 3 (Network). Source workstation: WS-ENG-05. T1078 T1021.002

Kernel module load: mimikatz.exe loaded on WS-ENG-05 at 03:12 UTC. Process: powershell.exe -Command Invoke-Mimikatz -DumpCerts. SHA256: 8a8b7c6d5e4f3a2b1c0d9e8f7a6b5c4d3e2f1a0b9c8d7e6f5a4b3c2d1e0f. T1003.001 S0002
Network connection from 172.16.30.120:52789 to 172.16.30.200:445 (FS-ENG-01). SMB2 protocol negotiation. Process: wmic.exe -interactive. T1047 T1021.002
WMI event subscription created on SQL-ENG-PROD by svc_sql. Query: SELECT * FROM Win32_Process WHERE Name='notepad.exe'. Command: powershell -EncodedCommand ... T1047 T1059.001

File creation: C:\ProgramData\Microsoft\Crypto\backup_script.ps1 on FS-ENG-01. Content includes Get-ChildItem -Path \\fs-eng-01\Engineering\Designs -Recurse | Compress-Archive -DestinationPath C:\temp\eng_data.zip. T1005 T1074.001
SMB copy operation: \\fs-eng-01\Engineering\Designs\*.* to 172.16.30.5\C$\temp\ at 04:30 UTC. 350 MB transferred. Source user: svc_backup_eng. T1021.002 T1005

Process hierarchy on WS-ENG-05: svchost.exe -> wmiprvse.exe -> cmd.exe -> powershell.exe -> rundll32.exe (absolutely path: C:\Users\Public\libraries\zipfldr.dll). DLL side-loading detected. T1574.002 T1055.001
